query:
SELECT jr.id, jr.job_id, jr.scheduled_for
            FROM job_runs jr
            JOIN jobs j ON j.id = jr.job_id
            WHERE jr.state = 'queued'
              AND jr.scheduled_for <= now()
              AND j.enabled = TRUE
              AND j.deleted_at IS NULL
            ORDER BY jr.scheduled_for
            FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED
            LIMIT $1
